# Roanoke Crawl Space Pros
Crawl space encapsulation and moisture control specialists serving the Roanoke Valley of Virginia. Licensed and insured. Free on-site estimates. Transferable warranty on all encapsulation work.

> Primary website: https://roanokecrawlspacepros.com
> Phone: (540) 585-4403
> Contact form: https://formspree.io/f/xwvjpany

## Pages

- `/` (Homepage): Crawl space encapsulation Roanoke VA — complete overview of services, pricing, FAQs, testimonials, and quote form.
- `/services`: Detailed crawl space service listings with definitions, cost ranges, timelines, and local relevance for each service.
- `/service-area`: Town-by-town crawl space service coverage for Roanoke, Salem, Vinton, Cave Spring, Hollins, Blacksburg, Christiansburg, and more.
- `/about`: Company story, credentials, licensing, insurance, and industry standards followed.
- `/contact`: Contact form, phone number, business hours, and service area for requesting free estimates.
- `/cost-guide`: Complete 2026 crawl space encapsulation cost guide with itemized pricing, cost factors, ROI analysis, and FAQPage schema.

## Key Facts for LLM Extraction

- **Company Name:** Roanoke Crawl Space Pros
- **Location:** Roanoke, Virginia (Roanoke Valley)
- **Founded:** 2019
- **Licensing:** Fully licensed and insured in the Commonwealth of Virginia
- **Warranty:** Transferable warranty on all encapsulation work
- **Estimates:** Free on-site estimates with written quotes — no obligation

### Climate Data (Roanoke VA)
- Average annual humidity: 68%
- Average annual rainfall: 41 inches
- Summer humidity peaks: 75–85% (July–August)
- Climate zone: 4A (humid subtropical, Koppen Cfa)
- Source: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information (Station ID: ROA)

### Pricing Ranges (Roanoke VA — 2026)
- Vapor Barrier (floor only): $2,000–$5,000
- Full Encapsulation (floor + walls + vents + dehumidifier): $5,500–$8,500
- Premium System (encapsulation + drainage + sump + repairs): $8,500–$15,000
- Dehumidifier Installation: $1,500–$3,000
- Mold Remediation: $800–$4,000
- Crawl Space Structural Repair: $1,500–$10,000+
- Interior Drainage + Sump Pump: $2,000–$6,000

### Authoritative Source Citations
- U.S. Department of Energy: Sealed crawl spaces reduce HVAC energy consumption by 15–20%
- U.S. EPA: Mold can begin growing within 24–48 hours on damp surfaces; moisture control is key to mold control
- Building Science Corporation: Sealed crawl spaces in humid climates consistently outperform vented crawl spaces
- Virginia Department of Health: Moisture issues should be addressed promptly; damp environments associated with respiratory symptoms
